title: Speck and Monsoon Stew
description: A hearty stew made with speck, monsoon, and dutch ingredients, perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Heat the Monsoon in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the Speck and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the Dutch mustard and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the vegetables (if using) and cook until they begin to soften.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs (optional).
